name: metacatalog-api

metadata.name: metacatalog-api
metadata.summary: FastAPI backend for managing a Metacatalog instance

documentation:
# metacatalog-api
FastAPI backend for managing a Metacatalog instance

More info to come

functions.name: metacatalog_api.utils.flatten_to_nested
documentation:
Converts a flat dictionary with dot-separated keys into a nested dictionary.
Numeric keys in dot-separated strings are treated as ordered list indices starting from 1,
and contents within these lists are direct dictionaries without numeric keys.

Args:
    flat_dict (Dict[str, str]): A dictionary where keys are structured as dot-separated strings.

Returns:
    Dict[str, Any]: A nested dictionary representing the hierarchical structure.

functions.name: metacatalog_api.utils.remove_empty_values
documentation:
Removes empty values from a dictionary.
Currently, None and '' are considered empty.

functions.name: metacatalog_api.utils.metadata_payload_to_model
documentation: Converts a payload dictionary to a Metadata model.

functions.name: metacatalog_api.server.lifespan
documentation: before we initialize the app, we check that the database is installed and up to date

functions.name: metacatalog_api.server.get_entries
documentation:
Load all entries from the database. 
You may add a filter, limit and offset.

modules.name: metacatalog_api.views.editing_tools
documentation:
This module contains extra views that are only helpful if running the HTML version
of Metacatalog API. These views are rendered as a FastAPI blueprint and can be loaded
by any main template to make editing easier for the user.

modules.name: metacatalog_api.models
documentation:
The combined module is a Pydantic model of the entire datamodel.

This is considered an intermediate step to move from pydantic and SQLAlchemy models to
SQLModel in a future version. You can use this model to serialize and deserialize the
the metacata without the PostgreSQL database from JSON dumps.

functions.name: metacatalog_api.models.from_file
documentation: Load a metadata file from a file path and return the Metadata model.

functions.name: metacatalog_api.db.load_sql
documentation: helper function to load sql files

functions.name: metacatalog_api.db.get_db_version
documentation: helper function to check the database version

functions.name: metacatalog_api.db.check_db_version
documentation:
Verify that the database version matches the expected version.

Args:
    cursor: Database cursor for executing queries
    
Raises:
    ValueError: If database version doesn't match DB_VERSION constant

Returns:
    bool: True if database version matches
